raw_text: Absolutely terrible experience with Blinkit. I placed an order at 3:06 AM and waited nearly an hour, trying to contact the delivery partner more than 10 times. He kept picking up the calls without speaking and eventually refused to come to my location—I have call recordings as proof. Despite this, support falsely claimed that they couldn’t reach me and then marked my order as delivered, even though I never received anything. So now customers are expected to stay awake all night, deal with unres

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Blinkit has completely changed the way I shop for daily essentials. The delivery is incredibly fast, often arriving within minutes, and the app is very easy to use. The product variety is excellent, with fresh groceries, household items, snacks, and much more available at competitive prices. The delivery partners are professional, and the order tracking feature is accurate and convenient. Whenever I've faced an issue, customer support has been responsive and helpful.

The order delivery service is very poor. It always takes longer than the time shown. For example, if it shows 11 minutes, after some time it becomes 15 minutes, and even then the order does not arrive within 15 minutes. I would suggest improving your delivery service and giving customers the actual delivery time from the beginning.

Very bad experience. I would give 0 stars if I could. Received someone else’s printout, which is a serious privacy issue, but they didn’t take ownership of the mistake. They only refunded the product amount while the delivery and handling charges were higher. Customer support was unhelpful and didn’t seem to understand the seriousness of sharing someone’s confidential documents. On top of that, I had to place the order again myself. Would not recommend this app.

STRICTLY FOR GROCERIES ONLY! Do not be foolish enough to buy electronics or any high-value items from this app. If your order arrives damaged or defective, you are completely on your own. Their customer service is utterly clueless and incompetent when it comes to returns or replacements. Save yourself the nightmare and buy your tech elsewhere.

it's charging unnecessary amount of money, 5rs on handling fee then again 30rs of delivery charge if ordered products less than 150rs. first of all we are not supposed to order more than 150 rupees everytime. it's mostly kids who order snacks then why will we pay more than 100rs for things under 70 or less, this is simply ridiculous. And again there is some kind of surge charge, totally scaming. Blinkit needs to work on this otherwise it's very inconvenient for customers who buy frequently.

During day time why would you charge a high surcharge and do i really have to order above 499 to get rid of it. I'll better walk to the nearby stores. I had to cancel dozens of orders whenever I saw a surcharge for orders even above 200. Good business i guess but could be better!!!

“Orders are getting delivered very late, and this has happened many times. When I try to call the rider or customer support, they often do not answer properly or ignore the calls. Please improve your delivery timing and customer service.”

Yesterday I ordered a Swim Full T-shirt of BoldFit of size L. There was no mention of Return Policy anywhere in the product details. The size didn't fit me and they are refusing to accept the return of the product claiming this product is non-returnable. Why should I suffer the loss if your app doesn't show me a non-returnable policy for this product in the product details. I am never buying anything from Blinkit again.

The Blinkit app has been facing a very frustrating payment issue recently. Almost every payment method keeps showing “This payment method is not available at the moment,” including Blinkit Money itself. What’s the point of having wallet balance if even Blinkit Money cannot be used continuously? The issue keeps repeating and makes checkout impossible. The app experience overall is good when it works, but payment failures at the final step completely ruin the convenience of quick commerce.

the worst delivery app yet... I have placed multiple orders till time and they have pathetic services... Their delivery partner always complaint about address and I don't know how come same address Other delivery apps can easily find, they do not have easy complaint options, even recently One order of mine was delivered to wrong address and it was worth Rs.1500 their delivery boy didn't call me didn't inform me and directly delivered the product at wrong address.. too bad performance.

I don't like this app because it charges too many handling charges , store charges, delivery charges are never lesser until your cart amount goes very high. I ordered an earphone and found my phone doesn't support them, I called for support then they executive Sakshi behaved very unprofessional. Reaching their customer support is so difficult. whenever I use this app, end up wasting my money.

this app is very helpful if we need something it delivers on time it never takes more time what is charge so much delivering charge if we you have ordered something of rs 97 imagine the price will increase to 151 kindly I request to charge less delivery charge the item which we are ordering is cheap but your delivery charge is so high

Even after turning the notification system on there are no messages of the product to be in stock and when I opened the app to check, it was already out of stock and thus I failed to buy the product repeatedly and this is an issue I face nearly every month and also the app lags a lot. Please Blinkit look into this matter, It will be a lot helpful for customers like us. Thank you

pathetic. most of the time shows order cannot be placed due to high demand. Moreover will not allow promo to be applied , gets error promo cannot be applied at this time. if you don't want to apply promo why advertise and mislead. feeling cheated by loading money and not been able to use it since 4 days at prime location in Mulund . Just trying to enjoy free money of customer, don't know how many such customers are stuck

My order arrived with missing items, and the customer support chat was not helpful at all. They neither arranged delivery of the missing items nor provided a refund. I have done online payment for the whole order .This was a very frustrating experience. I expected much better service and support from Blinkit.

Unnecessary surge charges are levied on most of the orders. If you want to extort, always mention before ordering, not at the checkout. We would use other shopping platforms where none of these extra charges are applied. Once tried to order at midnight, they mentioned surge charges applied due to high demand.

Blinkit is super convenient for quick grocery runs — deliveries are really fast and the app is easy to use. Prices can be a bit high in few items and sometimes items are out of stock, but for last-minute needs, it’s honestly a lifesaver, it's the bestt app. I love the paper bags and they are so fun.

hey, kunal this side, i order so many orders from the titwala store, and the services are worst they always send me damage products and charge with high surge, and when ever i tried to reach out, your team was like, we cant do anything becoz the items arw out of stock, what about customers, we order the items in urgency. i m your customer from past years even orders the items in bulks and still you are doing the same things with the old customer, really hate blinkit now, if you cant complete.

There was a time this application was running good. And the service was absolutely fantastic, but now, as I am saying it's through my own from 2 months or 3 months, maybe more, the service is not that much good as it was previous, they are removing the people and giving multiple orders for the one person delivery and there is no perfect timing for the delivery.
